summary: REQ-15 requires displaying 'huzluxe.in' as a clickable link (href='https://huzluxe.in') in at least one visible location, styled consistently with the dark charcoal and warm amber design system, without disrupting existing layout. The diff shows the domain link was added in multiple locations: beneath the HUZLUXE brand name in Navigation.tsx (with Globe icon, amber-tinted styling), as a 'Website' contact info card in ContactFooter.tsx, and in the footer brand section. All acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied.
